{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sentries
| aliases = Sentry
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sentries]] are larger and smarter than [[Pawns]] and are typically made from a single corpse.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A Sentry is part of the standard crew complement for an [[Iron Legion]] Penetrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
